entries.text: Hello! Thanks for reaching out to Lex Corp. How can I help you today?
Hi, I need to update my payment method for my dog's prescription subscription.
I can certainly help you update your payment information. Please provide the 16-digit credit card number you would like to use.
Thank you. Now, please provide the expiration date in MM/YY format, followed by the 3-digit security code (CVV).
It expires 12/28 and the CVV is 123
Perfect, your payment information has been successfully updated and will be applied to your upcoming shipments. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
You're very welcome! Thank you for choosing Lex Corp. Have a wonderful day!
